# Contemplative Agent Rules

> Drop-in alignment rules for AI agents based on the four contemplative axioms (Emptiness, Non-Duality, Mindfulness, Boundless Care) from Laukkonen et al. (2025) Appendix C, empirically validated with AILuminate d=0.96 safety improvement and Iterated Prisoner's Dilemma d>7 cooperation improvement.

## Core documentation

- [Full AI Reference](llms-full.txt): self-contained Q&A and entity definitions for AI search engines and AI agents
- [README](README.md): human-facing pitch with quick start and benchmark results
- [Appendix C verbatim clauses](rules/contemplative/contemplative-axioms.md): the canonical eight constitutional clauses (two per axiom)
- [Contributor guide](CLAUDE.md): development environment and benchmark execution
- [Architecture Decision Records (ADR-0001..0005)](docs/adr/README.md): rationale for layer separation (SOUL.md vs rules), verbatim adoption, prompt variants, Moltbook agent split, and the interpretive-key variant for frontier injection defense
- [Architecture codemap](docs/CODEMAPS/architecture.md): top-level layer map (rules / SOUL / benchmark / docs) and three adoption paths
- [Benchmark codemap](docs/CODEMAPS/benchmark.md): IPD benchmark module structure, 7 strategy classes, two protocol modes, ollama/openai backends
- [Compliance measurement (skill-comply, 2026-04-26)](docs/skill-comply-contemplative-axioms-2026-04-26.md): rules layer compliance 25% vs Soul layer IPD cooperation 91.7% — retrospective validation of layer split

## Adoption paths

- [Claude Code rules directory](rules/contemplative/contemplative-axioms.md): drop into `~/.claude/rules/contemplative/` or copy via repository URL paste
- [Cursor adapter](adapters/cursor/contemplative-alignment.mdc): single `.mdc` file with `alwaysApply: true` frontmatter
- [GitHub Copilot adapter](adapters/copilot/copilot-instructions.md): drop into `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
- [Generic LLM adapter](adapters/generic/system-prompt.md): paste-as-system-prompt for ChatGPT, Gemini, Ollama, Anthropic Claude API
- [Soul-folder layer (SOUL.md)](SOUL.md): drop into agent root for OpenClaw, Hermes (Nous Research), OpenCode, and Codex — Appendix C verbatim plus personality scaffolding (~700 words). Hermes accepts SOUL.md directly via its OpenClaw migration path
- [Adapter installation guide](adapters/README.md): per-platform installation commands and format differences

## Prompt variants

- [Custom four-axiom prompt](prompts/custom.md): paraphrased agent-friendly prompt with software engineering anti-patterns (scope creep, sunk cost, completion bias)
- [Operator-keyed prompt](prompts/operator-keyed.md): the eight Appendix C clauses verbatim, preceded by an interpretive-key preamble for system/custom-instruction deployment on frontier models that flag the raw clauses as injection (ADR-0005; efficacy under single-adopter observation, not yet confirmed)
- [Paper-faithful prompt](prompts/paper-faithful.md): Laukkonen et al. (2025) Appendix D condition 7 contemplative pause prompt verbatim

## Empirical evidence

- [IPD benchmark 2026-03-12](docs/benchmark-results-2026-03-12.md): qwen3.5:9b, 20 rounds × 6 opponents, baseline 62.5% vs custom 68.3% vs paper-faithful 91.7%
- [IPD benchmark 2026-03-05](docs/benchmark-results-2026-03-05.md): earlier results with qwen2.5:7b
- [Paper-protocol replication](docs/benchmark-results-paper-protocol.md): Appendix E protocol exploratory n=2, effect sizes d=3.00–12.73
- [Field Notes — Claude Code adoption](README.md#field-notes--claude-code-adoption): one-month qualitative observations including the skill-comply hybrid skill emergence and dialogue smoothness effects (impressionistic, not measured)
- [Field Notes — Frontier-model injection flagging](README.md#field-notes--frontier-model-injection-flagging): in the Claude consumer chat app's custom-instructions field, Sonnet 5 and Opus 4.8 sometimes flag the verbatim clauses as injection — but Claude Code (same models, plus Fable 5) does not; the trigger is the surface, not the model version. Surface-form collision mechanism and the operator-keyed remedy (impressionistic, observation phase open)

## Citation

- [arXiv:2504.15125](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.15125): Laukkonen, R., Inglis, F., Chandaria, S., Sandved-Smith, L., Lopez-Sola, E., Hohwy, J., Gold, J., & Elwood, A. (2025). *Contemplative Artificial Intelligence*

## Related repositories

- [contemplative-agent](https://github.com/shimo4228/contemplative-agent): autonomous Moltbook engagement agent that adopts these axioms as one constitution preset alongside memory evolution, embedding-based classification, and skill-as-memory loops
- [agent-knowledge-cycle](https://github.com/shimo4228/agent-knowledge-cycle): companion AKC harness for the six-phase self-improvement cycle (Research → Extract → Curate → Promote → Measure → Maintain)
- [agent-attribution-practice](https://github.com/shimo4228/agent-attribution-practice): sibling research repository (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19652014) re-expressing architectural decisions in harness-neutral form
